title: 4Pcs Jar Opener Gripper Pads, Reusable Bottle Opener Rubber Jar Gripper for Arthritic Weak Hands Multi-function Lid Opener Fit for Most Bottles Jar (Round)
description:
About this item
Package Quantity: One set includes 4pcs round jar opener gripper pads that come in different colors, allowing you to open various types of containers. Vibrant colors will add a touch of brightness and beauty to your home and kitchen.
Durable Material: The rubber bottle openers are made of high-quality rubber, resistant to twist, they won't easily tear or wear out, ensuring they can be used time and again. The jar gripper pads are also dishwasher safe, making them easy to clean.
Good Helper: These jar opener pads are designed with a ribbed texture that provides a secure grip on containers, so you can twist them open effortlessly. soft texture, so they can conform to the shape of the container for maximum grip, suitable for weak hands and seniors with arthritis.
Easy to Store: These jar opener pads are lightweight and compact, making them easy to store in a kitchen drawer or on a shelf. They don't take up much space and can be stacked neatly together for storage. Good gifts for weak hands and patients with arthritis.
Scenario to Use: These rubber jar opener pads can be used to open jars, bottles, cans, and other containers with ease, can also be used as an insulated coaster, anti-scald pad, or wrap for hot lids and hot handles to keep your hands from burning.
reviews_5s: It's a helper item on opening water bottle and jar lids.Opens a jar up with ease. Nice to have on hand.The jar openers are exactly what I was looking for. They provide the extra grip needed to open tight or oversized lids.Things do not slide on the surface of the gripper rounds. I use them to set cups on.Old tech that still works like a charm.Bought these for my mother in law, she loves them! Easy to use.
